name: Macaroni and Broccoli with Anchovies
recipeInstructions:
1. Using the macaroni water, cook the broccoli until done.
2. Remove the cooked broccoli and place it in a dish.
3. Place the cooked macaroni in a separate dish and add a little salt.
4. In a separate pot, saute garlic in olive oil over low heat until golden brown.
5. Add anchovies to the garlic and stir until they dissolve.
6. Once the garlic is golden brown, remove it from the oil.
7. Add the broccoli to the mixture and stir.
8. Pour the broccoli and oil mixture on top of the macaroni.
9. Top with Parmesan cheese.
